text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I did it! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahem. Excuse me. I lost my composure.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But maaan, talk about miracles. The racing gods
really smiled upon me this time.
choice_data_list: You won because you're a strong runner.
You won because you're a strong runner.

Next time, I'd like you to say you won by your
own merits.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But maaan, talk about miracles. The racing gods
really smiled upon me this time.
choice_data_list: You won because you're a strong runner.
You won because you're a strong runner.

Next time, I'd like you to say you won by your
own merits.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I don't think so! I really just got lucky this
time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I can't tell if I'm strong just from this one
race. That being said...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I’ll go along with your celebration this
time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... But that's like telling everyone I think
I'm fast.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It would be embarrassing if I lost after that.
choice_data_list: Then you just have to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I can't be that confident right off the bat.
But if I can keep this up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe then I could hold my head high and
proclaim to the whole world that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: NOPE! Never mind! Forget I ever said anything!
